ai_news.title: The AI security gap nobody wants to admit is already here

micro_tips.sql: Partial index s WHERE klauzulom smanjuje veličinu i ubrzava specifična filtriranja
micro_tips.oracle: LISTAGG(col, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY col) konkatenira u jedan string
micro_tips.regex: (?<ime>\d{4}) named group — referenciraj s \k<ime> ili $<ime> u replace
